title: oenothera gayophytum var. minuta
intro: Oenothera gayophytum var. minuta, also known as Dwarf Evening Primrose, is a low-growing, perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Onagraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Oenothera gayophytum var. minuta include improving skin health, reducing inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular well-being. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in skincare products to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
